zh.lifeSummary: 當Ulrich II de BAUGE於大約1150年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾時，他的父親Renaud III de Bâgé42歲，母親Alix de BEAUJEU37歲。他於大約1180年與Alix de Châlon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1220年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ulrich II de BAUGE于大约1150年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾时，他的父亲Renaud III de Bâgé42岁，母亲Alix de BEAUJEU37岁。他于大约1180年与Alix de Châlon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1220年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易博熱享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BAUGE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so named.
Dutch: topographic name denoting an inhabitant of a farm or settlement on a hill. Compare   Ten Barge  .
English and French: metonymic occupational name for a boatman, bargeman, or seaman, from Middle English, Old French barge ‘boat, barge’. Compare French Labarge .

variants.name: Ten Barge
meanings: Dutch: variant of the topographic name Ten Berge ‘at the hill’ (see Berg ).

nameMeanings.name: Ulrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from uodal ‘riches’ + rīc ‘power’; the name of two major German saints, Ulrich of Augsburg ( d. 973 ) and Ulrich of Cluny ( c.1018–93 ), and the Blessed Ulrich of Einsiedeln in Switzerland ( d. c.980 ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Ulrich II de BAUGE was born about 1150, in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Renaud III de Bâgé, was 42 and his mother, Alix de BEAUJEU, was 37. He married Alix de Châlon about 1180. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1220, in Baugé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 72.

ko.lifeSummary: Ulrich II de BAUGE(이)가 대략 1150년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 브a그e-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud III de Bâgé(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de BEAUJEU(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 Alix de Châlon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1220년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 바그e에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ulrich II de BAUGE nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Renaud III de Bâgé, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alix de BEAUJEU, tinha 37 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ulrich II de BAUGE родился около 1150 г. в местности бaгe-ле-чaтел, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud III de Bâgé было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de BEAUJEU, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Châlon около 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1220 г. в местности баугe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.
